prompt: Create a clean full-body anime-style fashion illustration of one young woman standing in a three-quarter side profile against a plain white background. She has a slim athletic build, fair skin, glossy short black bob haircut with thick layered strands and chin-length ends, and her face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular soft blurred censor block centered over the face. She wears exactly 2 visible clothing pieces: a loose white cropped athletic tank top with wide straps, subtle fabric folds, stitched seams, and large pale blue chest lettering reading AMES; and white elastic-waist athletic shorts with soft wrinkles, seam lines, and a slightly flared hem. Pose her with one hand resting on her waist and the other arm relaxed downward, torso angled left, head turned slightly left, emphasizing a confident casual summer sportswear pose. Use polished Japanese anime rendering with crisp ink outlines, realistic glossy hair highlights, soft skin shading, delicate anatomy, minimal shadowing, no background objects, no watermark, and a tall vertical canvas composition.
